meta.title: DEF CON 29 Biohacking Village - Pia Zaragoza, Joel Isaac -HC Innovation with People of All Abilities
meta.description: The World Bank reported in their 2020 Disability Inclusion report that there are one billion people or 15% of the world’s population that experience some form of disability. During this presentation, Joel Isaac and Pia Zaragoza will go over key concepts around disability inclusion, universal design and accessibility to spark ideas around healthcare innovation amongst the disability, medical manufacturers, regulators, cyber research, citizen science, and biohacker communities.
